$comment: Module manifest — the contract between this module and the Jarvis core (Plugin Architecture / Separation of concerns). Status 'planned': structurally valid scaffold for a future capability.
name: Presentation Assistant
description: Generates a structured slide outline and speaker notes from a short brief.

envVars.name: PRESENTATION_ASSISTANT_ENABLED
envVars.description: Set to 'true' to enable this module's workflow.

envVars.name: PRESENTATION_DEFAULT_SLIDES
envVars.description: Default target number of slides when the brief does not specify one.
